c20744.st: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by [the] will of God,

c20745.st: To the saints in Ephesus, [the] faithful in Christ Jesus:

c20746.st: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and [the] Lord Jesus Christ.

c20747.st: Blessed [be] the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,

c20748.st: who has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly realms.

c20749.st: For He chose us in Him before [the] foundation of [the] world

c20750.st: to be holy and blameless in His presence. In love

c20751.st: He predestined us for adoption as His sons through Jesus Christ,

c20752.st: according to the good pleasure of His will,

c20753.st: to [the] praise of His glorious grace,

c20754.st: which He has freely given us in the Beloved [One].

c20755.st: In [Him] we have redemption through His blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses,

c20756.st: according to the riches of His grace,

c20767.st: who were the first to hope in Christ,

c20770.st: were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit
